compiled_state.title: [ccc3-954a] RED: Write tests for migrate-markdown-refs.py (at repo root scripts/)

compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What to do
Create tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py with failing tests for scripts/migrate-markdown-refs.py which does not exist yet.

## Tests to write
- test_runtime_code_block: plugins/dso path inside ```bash block → ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/...
- test_runtime_tool_invocation: Read("plugins/dso/foo") → Read("${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/foo")
- test_prose_strip_prefix: backtick `plugins/dso/docs/foo.md` in prose → `docs/foo.md`
- test_skip_shim_exempt: lines with # shim-exempt: NOT modified
- test_dry_run_no_mutation: --dry-run makes no changes
- test_idempotent: running twice = running once
- test_no_bypass_annotations: output files contain zero plugin-self-ref-ok annotations

## Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py (at REPO ROOT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py
- [ ] Contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "def test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py | awk "{exit (\$1 < 7)}"
- [ ] All tests FAIL before implementation
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test-migrate-markdown-refs.py 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
